name: Potential Windows Command Shell Interpreter
notes:
This rule triggers when the usage of path traversal in cmd.exe indicating possible command/argument confusion/hijacking.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: xknow @xknow_infosec, Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: Cmd.exe CommandLine Path Traversal
SIGMA Description: detects the usage of path traversal in cmd.exe indicating possible command/argument confusion/hijacking


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe, Parent Command (custom) contains any of [/c or /k or /r or /../../]
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of \Tasktop\keycloak\bin\/../../jre\bin\java
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [\??\C:\Windows\system32\conhost.exe 0xffffffff -ForceV1 or \system32\conhost.exe 0xffffffff -ForceV1]
TD_list: APPLY Potential Windows Command Shell Interpreter on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of cmd.exe, Parent Command (custom) contains any of [/c or /k or /r or /../../]
AND NOT when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of \Tasktop\keycloak\bin\/../../jre\bin\java
AND NOT when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [\??\C:\Windows\system32\conhost.exe 0xffffffff -ForceV1 or \system32\conhost.exe 0xffffffff -ForceV1]
RED_list: Event name: Potential Windows Command Shell Interpreter
Event description: Detects the usage of path traversal in cmd.exe indicating possible command/argument confusion/hijacking.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
